Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Order Dismissing Entire Action
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Demas Yan, Tel. 867.5797, plaintiff and moving party appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff provided the court with a copy of the notice of removal filed in bankruptcy court. After reviewing the case and to the satisfaction of the court, PLAINTIFF DEMAS YAN's Motion To Set Aside Order Dismissing Entire Action is granted. The Order Dismissing Entire Action issued on March 22, 2013 is vacated in light of the bankruptcy stay. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Order Dismissing Entire Action
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Continued To May-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DEMAS YAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER DISMISSING ENTIRE ACTION is continued on the court's own motion to May 14, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Defendants the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendants must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 29, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (610)
